Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 12}While exploring, you can press {f 1 3 114} to open the {f 0 1 2}Minimap{f 0 1 27}, which shows your current location as well as the path you traveled.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}It also displays information on {f 0 1 2}enemy and treasure chest locations{f 0 1 27}, so don't hesitate to check it every now and then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}After finding the stairs{f 0 1 27}, you can use the shortcut to move to the next floor {f 0 1 2}from any spot{f 0 1 27}. It could be worth your while to scour the current floor before moving on to the next.[n]{f 1 1}
